summary: README, Plugin metadata, package Skills, protocol, tests, and website now present OpenNori as one agent capability bundle: Plugin discovery, packaged Skills, opennori deterministic state layer, and .opennori project state work together. The old split-path language is removed, and nori/project-health Skills route missing bundle parts to doctor/health recovery instead of half-installed use.

sources.label: rg -n 'Install OpenNori Capability Bundle|capability bundle|deterministic state layer|not a separate product path|Do not treat Plugin|Do not split OpenNori|half-installed|Install one OpenNori capability bundle|Advanced state-layer commands|Choose one path|Try CLI once|Pin CLI' README.md plugins/opennori/.codex-plugin/plugin.json plugins/opennori/skills/nori/SKILL.md plugins/opennori/skills/nori-project-health/SKILL.md .opennori/protocol.md test/core.test.js /Users/jarl/code/jarlone/opennori-site/src/pages/index.astro

reviewability: Read README Install/Quick Start, Plugin longDescription, nori and nori-project-health Skill frontmatter/body, protocol AC-Z-18, website Start section, and test/core.test.js public product surface assertions; rerun npm run check and the rg command.
limitations: This proves source, packaged assets, tests, and local website source. Live Codex plugin behavior still depends on installing the updated package/plugin in a new session after publish.
